state.next-action: Phase `18` is in progress. `18-01` through `18-04` are complete: `shared-sections` now has a version-aware Payload collection contract, permissions, migrations, library routes, a dedicated `/shared-sections/[id]/edit` source editor, composer insert/replace/detach flows for linked shared sections, a block browser grouped into `Layouts`, `Sections`, and `Shared`, and explicit validation that keeps shared-section structures constrained to the current shallow single-block phase-18 model. Next, start `18-05` by adding lightweight restore flows for shared-section versions and page versions without expanding into approvals, scheduling, or diff tooling.
